raw_consumer_statement:
Timeline XX/XX/year> - Tried to purchase tickets for the XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX - Tickets appeared that they would be {$390.00} for XXXX seats - After entering Credit Card info I was directed to XXXX XXXX that was providing the tickets and the total was now over {$1300.00} - Realizing this was a bait-and-switch scam I tried to cancel - Sent a Cancel Email to XXXX XXXX. Found their policy for not allowing cancel. 
- They allow you to sell the tickets and say you will get them between XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year> XX/XX/year> - Seeing the sophistication of the scam and the fact that I didn't get any tickets I decided to put in a dispute with our Credit Card provider Citi XX/XX/year> - Citi notified that they received the dispute XX/XX/year> - Citi tried to contact the merchant XX/XX/year> - Email from Citi says the merchant responded ( this is the day of the show ) XX/XX/year> - Citi says that the dispute was resolved and that the customer was responsible. 
XX/XX/year> - Citi sent an Email saying if we dispute further that we need to provide XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> - I never got refunded and I never got any tickets. Citi and XXXX XXXX decided that they get their money and I get nothing.
